title: CompositionStatePacket
description: Stage-2 output from music-teacher (Coach-Producer). Captures the locked arrangement state after structural gap analysis and gap-filling. Consumed by maker:playlist-builder (Curator-Performer) in Stage 3.

$schema.description: JSON Schema identifier. Must reference this schema's $id.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this packet schema.

packet_id.description: Globally unique ULID identifying this packet instance.

track_id.description: Stable track identifier, unchanged from AcousticIngestPacket.

source_packet_id.description: packet_id of the AcousticIngestPacket that triggered this composition pass.

revision_token.description: Monotonic ULID minted by Coach-Producer for this composition state. Every edit produces a new token; prior states are immutable (see docs/data_integrity.md).

arrangement_complete.description: True only when all detected gaps have been resolved. Curator-Performer must not consume a packet where this is false.

sections.description: Ordered list of section labels in the final arrangement (e.g. ["intro", "verse-A", "chorus", "outro"]). Suffixed with "-generated" for AI-filled sections.

gaps_found.description: Section labels identified as missing from the original ingested score.

gaps_resolved.description: Subset of gaps_found that were successfully generated. Must equal gaps_found when arrangement_complete is true.

unresolved_notes.description: Optional notes on any gaps that could not be resolved and why.

camelot_code.description: Camelot Wheel key code, confirmed or updated from the AcousticIngestPacket. Coach-Producer may refine the key after harmonic analysis but final sequencing authority rests with Curator-Performer.

bpm.description: Confirmed tempo after gap-fill (may differ from source if generated sections shifted the feel).

harmonic_notes.description: Optional Coach-Producer commentary on chord substitutions, modal suggestions, or harmonic choices made during gap-fill.

updated_formats.description: Formats regenerated by Coach-Producer after gap-fill (typically musicxml and midi).

locked_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when arrangement was locked and this packet was emitted (see docs/data_integrity.md).
